_metadata.name: Woese Polar Requirement scale
_metadata.source: Woese, C.R. (1973). Evolution of the genetic code. Naturwissenschaften 60:447-459. Values from Mathew & Luthey-Schulten (2008) J Mol Evol 66:519-528, Table 1.
_metadata.description: Chromatographic measure of amino acid polarity in an RNA-binding context. Used by Freeland & Hurst (1998) as the primary metric for genetic code error-minimization. Distance = |PR_i - PR_j|.
